A short description of the change and why.

Closes #(issue)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added/updated tests for new behaviour)
- [ ] No secrets and no real/personal data committed
- [ ] Trust contract intact (grounded + cited; refuses with no context)
- [ ] Shared metadata keys still come from `src/constants.ts`
- [ ] Docs / playbook updated if behaviour or interfaces changed
